title: Energy inflation has been more persistent than expected, Fed's Goolsbee tells CNBC
summary_full: While oil prices have recently fallen on news that a peace deal between the U.S. and Iran could come, prices are still significantly higher than before the war.
summary_public: While oil prices have recently fallen on news that a peace deal between the U.S. and Iran could come, prices are still significantly higher than before the war.

IR.label: positive
IR.evidence: peace deal between the U.S. and Iran could come
